behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the relevant config paths (workers.celery.hpa, workers.hpa), executor names, schema property names (enabled, minReplicaCount, maxReplicaCount, metrics, behavior), and the 'deprecated' keyword requirement. The repo test file paths used in P2P tests are standard Airflow chart test paths.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes desired behavior and config paths but doesn't dictate template implementation, file edits, or specific helper function names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on rendered Helm output (kind, spec.minReplicas, spec.metrics, scaleTargetRef.kind) which any correct implementation must produce; no internal naming is checked.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke `helm template` via subprocess and parse YAML output, asserting on rendered Kubernetes resources.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each F2P test asserts specific values (e.g., spec.minReplicas==2, default cpu metric block, kind=='HorizontalPodAutoscaler') that require actual template rendering logic.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover executor gating, KEDA exclusion, default metrics, custom metrics, behavior, persistence target ref, worker sets, backward compat, and disabled-by-default.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with clear section comments (FAIL-TO-PASS, PASS-TO-PASS) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Instruction documents required schema properties (enabled, minReplicaCount, maxReplicaCount, metrics, behavior) and the deprecated description requirement.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (workers.celery.hpa, CeleryKubernetesExecutor, ScaledObject, scaleTargetRef) are spelled correctly.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction refers to chart and HPA template areas in general terms without naming specific lines or template files to edit.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code/template change task, not an agentmd config-edit task.
